---
title: "CV"
---
::: {.page-nav}
[← Home](index.qmd){.nav-button}
[Projects](projects.qmd){.nav-button}
[Contact](contact.qmd){.nav-button}
:::

::: {.cv-card}
## Professional Summary

I am a graduate student in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University Metropolitan College, with a background in internal audit, AML/KYC audit support, ERP implementation, financial records digitization, and process improvement. Before coming to Boston, I built experience connecting business operations with data-driven problem solving in Thailand. I am now continuing to strengthen my technical skills in Python, SQL, R, Tableau, GitHub, and AWS to translate data into practical business insights.

[Download Resume PDF](assets/Nutchanon_Chaiyaratana_Resume.pdf){.button}
[Download Resume Word File](assets/Nutchanon_Chaiyaratana_Resume.docx){.button .secondary}
:::

## Education

**Boston University, Metropolitan College** — Boston, MA  
Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics, Expected August 2026

**Kasetsart University** — Bangkok, Thailand  
Bachelor of Business Administration in Accounting, 2014–2018

## Core Skills

- **Analytics & Tools:** Python, SQL, R, Tableau, GitHub, AWS
- **Business Skills:** Internal audit, KYC audit support, marketing analysis, process improvement, accounting
